name: Breadcrumbs
description: A context-driven breadcrumb trail. Placed once in a shared placeholder, it derives the trail from the current page's position in the content tree via an Experience Edge ancestors query fetched server-side. Home first; current page last, unlinked, with aria-current; BreadcrumbList JSON-LD for SEO; renders nothing on the home page.

sitecore.placement: Breadcrumbs is page chrome: add its rendering ONCE to a shared placeholder so it appears on every page. In XM Cloud Pages, add it to a partial design (for example the header); otherwise add it to the page template's standard-values presentation. No datasource is needed. The app must expose SITECORE_EDGE_CONTEXT_ID as a server-side environment variable. Pages Router only: the trail is fetched via getComponentServerProps; App Router users should port Breadcrumbs.data.ts into a React Server Component.
